title: CFPB HMDA Median DTI by Loan Type — Home Purchase 2018-2025

trend.direction: rising — lenders accepting higher DTI while tightening FICO

ofi_finding.interpretation: FHA allows 57% DTI. Actual median approved borrower has 47% DTI. 10pp downward overlay on DTI.

combined_with_fico.conclusion: Lenders apply two-directional overlay squeeze: FICO pushed up +98pp, DTI pushed down -10pp. Borrowers must be better than agency guidelines on BOTH dimensions to get approved.

secondary_finding: FHA DTI rising since 2021 (44% to 47%) while FICO held stable at 667-678. Lenders shifted overlay mix: accepting higher DTI but maintaining strict FICO floor. This suggests overlay is dynamic, not static.
